case_title: LUSCUTOFF, LENDORMY & ASSOCIATES VS CHEUNG, DAVID

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LUSCUTOFF, LENDORMY & ASSOCIATES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHEUNG, DAVID $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $22.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,522.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. THE JUDGMENT IS FOR UNPAID LEGAL SERVICES PROVIDED IN 2002 TO THE PRESENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-03-2006, DENIED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY LUSCUTOFF, LENDORMY & ASSOCIATES AS TO DEFENDANT CHEUNG, DAVID ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR DEC-13-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHEUNG, DAVID HEARING SET FOR FEB-03-2006 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION DEC-13-2005, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO DEC-20-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506 WORK CONFLICT. I AM SUPERVISING RESIDENT DOCTOR'S AT THE HOSPITAL & THERE IS NO OTHER PHYSICIAN AVAILABLE WITH PROPER QUALIFICATIONS TO REPLACE ME THAT DAY.
